description: Source-of-truth definitions for all NetWebMedia pipeline automations. Loaded into resources(type=workflow) by api-php/seed-automations.php. Re-run seeder anytime — workflows are upserted by slug. Bilingual: every send_email/send_whatsapp uses {en,es} objects; lang resolves from contact.lang or ctx.lang and falls back to en. Template references use enroll_sequence (existing email-templates/ system) so we don't duplicate copy.

body.en:
Hi {{first_name|there}},

You're in. We send one short email a week — no fluff, just what's working in AI-powered marketing for SMBs.

— Carlos
body.es:
Hola {{first_name|amigo}},

Estás dentro. Mandamos un email corto por semana — sin relleno, solo lo que está funcionando en marketing con IA para PYMEs.

— Carlos

subject.en: The 14 niches we go deep on
subject.es: Los 14 nichos donde vamos a fondo

body.en: Quick value drop: every NetWebMedia playbook is built for one of 14 niches. Reply with yours and I'll send the niche-specific deck.
body.es: Aporte rápido: cada playbook de NetWebMedia está hecho para uno de 14 nichos. Respóndeme con el tuyo y te envío el deck específico.

else.message: Subscriber not engaged after 6d — staying as subscriber

steps.message: 🟧 New audit request: {{company|?}} ({{email}}). Deal created and assigned. Bilingual drip enrolled.

steps.prompt_tpl: Draft a 3-sentence personalized reply to this cold email response. Their reply: '{{reply_body}}'. They are at {{company|?}} in {{niche|the SMB}} space. Tone: friendly, helpful, no pitch. Sign off as Carlos. Match the language of their reply (English or Spanish).

steps.title_tpl: Review & send AI-drafted reply to {{first_name|?}} at {{company|?}}

steps.message: 💬 Cold email reply from {{email}} ({{company|?}}). AI draft ready. Task created.

then.message: 🔥 {{email}} ({{company|?}}) visited /pricing {{visit_count}}× — likely buying. Reach out today.

subject.en: Saw you checking out our pricing — questions?
subject.es: Vi que estás mirando los planes — ¿preguntas?

body.en:
Hi {{first_name|there}}, noticed you've been on our pricing page. Happy to walk you through what fits your situation — reply with your top 1-2 questions and I'll answer same-day.

— Carlos
body.es:
Hola {{first_name|amigo}}, vi que estuviste en nuestra página de precios. Encantado de explicarte qué encaja con tu caso — respóndeme con 1-2 preguntas y te contesto el mismo día.

— Carlos

steps.message: Cron: scanning for contacts with last_contact > 30d and no opens

body.en:
That review just made our week. As a thanks: here's REFER15 — anyone you refer gets 15% off their first 3 months and you get $200 credit when they convert.

— Carlos
body.es:
Esa reseña nos alegró la semana. Como agradecimiento: aquí va REFER15 — quien refieras obtiene 15% off los primeros 3 meses y tú recibes $200 de crédito cuando convierta.

— Carlos

steps.title_tpl: Send hand-written thank-you card to {{first_name|?}} at {{company|?}}

steps.message: ⭐ New review from {{company|?}}. Tagged evangelist. Referral coupon sent.
Contact moved to disqualified lifecycle stage

subject.en: One thing most {{niche|SMB}} owners get wrong about marketing
subject.es: Lo que la mayoría de {{niche|PYMEs}} hacen mal en marketing

body.en: Hi {{first_name|there}}, one quick observation from auditing 100+ {{niche|SMB}} sites this year...
body.es: Hola {{first_name|amigo}}, una observación rápida tras auditar 100+ sitios de {{niche|PYMEs}} este año...

subject.en: How {{niche|one of our clients}} cut their cost-per-lead 62%
subject.es: Cómo {{niche|uno de nuestros clientes}} redujo el costo por lead 62%

body.en: Short case study + the exact playbook we used. Read here →
body.es: Caso breve + el playbook exacto que usamos. Leer aquí →

subject.en: Want me to audit your setup, {{first_name|there}}?

body.en: Free 90-day growth roadmap, no obligation. Request your audit here →
body.es: Roadmap de crecimiento de 90 días, gratis y sin compromiso. Solicita tu auditoría aquí →

body.en: {{first_name|There}} — 1 year today. Thank you. Here's LOYAL20 for 20% off your next add-on or upgrade.
body.es: {{first_name|Amigo}} — 1 año hoy. Gracias. Aquí va LOYAL20 para 20% off en tu próximo add-on o upgrade.

then.message: 💎 HIGH-VALUE new deal: {{title}} — ${{value}}. Routed to least-loaded rep.

workflows.title: Sales · Contacted Stage SLA (3-day stale alert)

then.message: Deal {{title}} ({{company|?}}) has been in 'Contacted' for 3 days. Push to Qualified or back to New Lead.

steps.prompt_tpl: Draft a one-page proposal outline for {{company|the prospect}} in the {{niche|SMB}} space. Their needs: {{notes|build full digital presence}}. Deal value target: ${{value}}. Include: (1) one-line problem statement, (2) 3-bullet solution, (3) deliverables, (4) timeline, (5) investment. Concise, scannable. Match recipient language: {{lang|en}}.

steps.title_tpl: Send proposal to {{company|?}} within 48h (AI outline ready)

steps.message: ✅ Deal qualified: {{title}}. AI proposal outline drafted. 48h SLA started.

body.en:
Just making sure the proposal landed and answering any questions before the team meeting. Anything I can clarify?

— Carlos
body.es:
Solo para confirmar que llegó la propuesta y resolver dudas antes de tu reunión de equipo. ¿Algo que aclare?

— Carlos

body.en: Hey {{first_name|there}}, Carlos here. Quick WhatsApp follow-up on the NetWebMedia proposal — got 5 min for a quick call this week?
body.es: Hola {{first_name|amigo}}, Carlos por aquí. Seguimiento rápido por WhatsApp sobre la propuesta de NetWebMedia — ¿tienes 5 min esta semana?

subject.en: Two quick options if budget is the question
subject.es: Dos opciones rápidas si el tema es presupuesto

body.en: Sometimes proposals stall on scope. Happy to send a phased option (start small, expand quarterly) if that's useful — just say the word.
body.es: A veces las propuestas se atascan por scope. Puedo mandarte una opción por fases (empezar chico, expandir trimestral) si te sirve — solo avísame.

then.message: ⏰ Proposal {{title}} ({{company|?}}) — 9 days no movement. Owner: review or re-stage.

then.prompt_tpl: We've been in negotiation 5+ days on deal {{title}} (${{value}}, {{company|?}}, niche {{niche|SMB}}). Notes: {{notes|none}}. Suggest: (1) likely sticking point, (2) one concrete concession that protects margin, (3) a soft-close line for the next call. 6-bullet max.

then.message: 🟥 Carlos: {{title}} stalled in Negotiation (${{value}}). AI playbook drafted in deal notes.

steps.message: 🎉 CLOSED WON: {{title}} — ${{value}} ({{company|?}}). Onboarding tasks created. Welcome sequence enrolled. CSM alerted.

workflows.title: Sales · Closed Lost → Reason Capture & 90d Recycle

body.en:
Totally understand the timing wasn't right. One favor: 1-line reply with what tipped it (price / timing / fit / other). Helps us improve. Door's open whenever.

— Carlos
body.es:
Entiendo que el timing no fue. Un favor: respóndeme en 1 línea qué pesó (precio / timing / fit / otro). Nos ayuda a mejorar. Puerta abierta cuando quieras.

— Carlos

steps.message: Cron scan: open deals where days_in_stage > stage SLA
📋 Daily stale-deal report — see /pipeline?filter=stale for details.

then.message: 💎 EXEC FYI: {{title}} qualified at ${{value}}. Owner: {{owner_name|?}}. Carlos — review thread.

then.prompt_tpl: Draft 3 strategic questions Carlos should ask on the next call with {{company|?}} ({{niche|SMB}}, ${{value}} deal). Focus on: decision authority, success metrics, competitive landscape. Concise. Match language: {{lang|en}}.

body.en: Hey {{first_name|there}} — Carlos at NetWebMedia, just missed your call. Best time to call you back today, or want to schedule? Calendar: https://netwebmedia.com/contact
body.es: Hola {{first_name|amigo}} — Carlos de NetWebMedia, perdí tu llamada. ¿A qué hora te llamo hoy, o quieres agendar? Calendario: https://netwebmedia.com/contact

then.message: 📞 Missed call from {{first_name|?}} (open deal: {{deal_title}}). Auto-text sent.

body.en:
Hi {{first_name|there}}, confirmed for {{appointment_date}} at {{appointment_time}}. Add to calendar: {{calendar_link}}. See you then.

— Carlos
body.es:
Hola {{first_name|amigo}}, confirmado para el {{appointment_date}} a las {{appointment_time}}. Agrega al calendario: {{calendar_link}}. Nos vemos.

— Carlos

body.en: Booked ✅ — {{appointment_title}} on {{appointment_date}} at {{appointment_time}}. Reply if anything changes.
body.es: Agendado ✅ — {{appointment_title}} el {{appointment_date}} a las {{appointment_time}}. Avísame si algo cambia.

subject.es: Recordatorio: nos reunimos hoy a las {{appointment_time}}

body.en: Quick reminder — see you today at {{appointment_time}}. Link: {{meeting_link}}
body.es: Recordatorio — nos vemos hoy a las {{appointment_time}}. Enlace: {{meeting_link}}

subject.en: We missed you, {{first_name|there}} — easy to reschedule

body.en:
No worries, things come up. Use the same calendar link to grab a new time: book here. Or reply with a couple of times that work.

— Carlos
body.es:
Sin problema, pasan cosas. Usa el mismo enlace para tomar otra hora: agenda aquí. O respóndeme con 2-3 horarios que te funcionen.

— Carlos

body.en: Hi {{first_name|there}} — Carlos here. Want to grab 15 min this week instead? Easier than back-and-forth.
body.es: Hola {{first_name|amigo}} — Carlos. ¿Tomamos 15 min esta semana en vez del ida y vuelta?

steps.message: Weekly scan: deals with no activity in 14d → reduce probability 20%
📉 Weekly probability decay applied. Check pipeline for re-prioritization.

workflows.title: Sales · New Customer Tag → AI Welcome

steps.prompt_tpl: Write a 4-sentence personalized welcome email for a new NetWebMedia customer. Company: {{company|?}}, niche: {{niche|SMB}}, plan: {{plan|Pro}}. Mention one specific module relevant to their niche. Warm, founder-tone. Sign as Carlos. Language: {{lang|en}}.

subject.es: Bienvenido a bordo, {{first_name|amigo}} — nota personal rápida

steps.message: 👋 New customer tagged: {{company|?}} ({{niche|SMB}}). AI welcome sent. Delivery team — pick up.

else.message: 💬 WhatsApp from unknown number {{phone}}: "{{message}}". Consider adding as contact.

steps.message: Hourly: scan public_chat_log for sessions w/ pricing/demo/audit keywords + email + no follow-up yet
🤖 Chatbot intent review queued — check public_chat_log dashboard.
